name: Solithromycin
description: Solithromycin is a ketolide antibiotic undergoing clinical development for the treatment of community-acquired pneumonia (CAP) and other infections.
indication: Investigated for the treatment of community-acquired pneumonia (CAP).

interactions.name: Pravastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Solithromycin is combined with Pravastatin.

interactions.name: Lovastatin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Solithromycin is combined with Lovastatin.

interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Solithromycin is combined with Cerivastatin.

interactions.name: Ubidecarenone
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Solithromycin is combined with Ubidecarenone.

interactions.name: Vemurafenib
interactions.description: The risk or severity of QTc prolongation can be increased when Vemurafenib is combined with Solithromycin.

interactions.name: Cisapride
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Cisapride can be increased when it is combined with Solithromycin.

interactions.name: Disopyramide
interactions.description: Solithromycin may increase the QTc-prolonging activities of Disopyramide.

interactions.name: Quinine
